title: Use normalized evidence matching for mathematical OCR text
problem: Verbatim evidence validation produced many false warnings for LaTeX spacing and OCR-normalized formulas in real AG95 papers.
proposed_change: Accept exact, token-normalized, or ellipsis-separated evidence matches while preserving warnings for unmatched quotes.
acceptance_criteria: AG95 pilot validation has zero false warnings after normalized matching.

history.note: Evidence validator now handles math/OCR spacing and ellipsis snippets.
